totalSleepTime_min.notes: Total time in bed; for TST use sleep periods minus wake

wakeAfterSleepOnset_min.notes: Time spent awake after falling asleep

stages.n2_pct.notes: Combined N1+N2; labeled as light sleep

sleepCycles.notes: Number of complete sleep cycles detected

recoveryMetrics.description: WHOOP recovery metrics relate to sleep quality and readiness

recoveryScore.notes: Overall recovery score based on HRV, RHR, sleep

limitations: Requires consistent wear for accurate baseline

hrv.notes: Measured during deep sleep for consistency

sleepNeed.notes: Adapts to individual based on historical data

strainTracking.description: WHOOP tracks daily strain which influences sleep need
strainTracking.notes: Higher strain increases calculated sleep need

sleepCoach.description: Provides recommended bedtime and wake time

convertToWIASleep.description: Transform WHOOP API response to WIA-SLEEP format
